description: Create a 'chipped paint' material effect on the 'SciFiCrate' object by painting a wear mask. UV unwrap the object and create a 1024x1024 black image texture named 'wear_mask'. Paint white wear details along the edges and corners of the crate. Configure the material to mix a blue base color (paint) and a grey metallic base color (metal) using the 'wear_mask' image texture as the mix factor. Save the painted image to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/wear_mask.png and the project to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/distressed_crate.blend.
